{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Path of the Sandvipers
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Path of the Sandvipers]] has no techniques for speed.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4">''Blackflame'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
